stories.name: core-codex-integration
stories.title: Add codex framework to provisioner, wizard, and config
stories.description:
Add codex as a non-configurable default framework throughout the codebase:

1. Create Ansible roles:
   - src/clauded/roles/codex-ubuntu/tasks/main.yml: npm install -g @openai/codex, verify installation
   - src/clauded/roles/codex-alpine/tasks/main.yml: npm install -g @openai/codex, verify installation
   Both roles should follow the playwright npm install pattern (command module, register output, changed_when, verify version)

2. Provisioner changes (src/clauded/provisioner.py):
   - Add 'codex' to _ROLES_WITH_VARIANTS frozenset
   - Add codex block in _get_base_roles(): if 'codex' in config.frameworks, auto-add node if missing (same as playwright), append 'codex'

3. Wizard changes (src/clauded/wizard.py):
   - Line ~209: Change answers['frameworks'] = ['claude-code'] + [...] to ['claude-code', 'codex'] + [...]
   - Line ~369: Same change in edit wizard flow

4. Detection integration (src/clauded/detect/wizard_integration.py):
   - Line ~86: Add 'codex' to static defaults frameworks list
   - Lines ~185-186: Add 'codex' to post-wizard frameworks
   - Lines ~543-544: Add codex check in merge_detection_with_config (if 'codex' not in frameworks_list, insert it)

5. CLI integration (src/clauded/detect/cli_integration.py):
   - In create_wizard_defaults(): ensure 'codex' is always in frameworks

6. Tests:
   - test_provisioner.py: test_includes_codex_when_in_frameworks, test_codex_auto_includes_node
   - test_config.py or test_wizard.py: verify codex in default frameworks
   - Existing property-based tests should be updated if they assert on frameworks content

scenarios.name: Codex role included in provisioning
scenarios.description: Verify that provisioner generates playbook with codex role for both distros

stories.notes: This is the core implementation story. Codex roles are simple (npm install only, no browser deps like playwright). Follow playwright pattern for Node.js auto-dependency in provisioner.

stories.name: documentation-changelog
stories.title: Update documentation and changelog for codex framework
stories.description:
Update project documentation to reflect the new codex framework:

1. README.md:
   - Add Codex to the 'Frameworks & Tools' table (after Claude Code row)
   - Row: | Codex | AI-assisted development CLI (OpenAI) | Node.js |

2. CHANGELOG.md:
   - Add entry under [Unreleased] / Added:
   - 'Added OpenAI Codex as default framework for Ubuntu and Alpine VMs'

3. specs/spec.md (if frameworks are listed there, add codex)

4. Run make check to verify no issues

scenarios.name: Documentation accuracy
scenarios.description: Verify README lists codex in frameworks table and CHANGELOG has entry

stories.notes: Simple documentation update. Should be done after story 01 is complete.

dependency_notes: Story 02 (docs) is independent of story 01 (code) but logically follows it. Both can be implemented independently.
